channel.title: AI Development Playbook Podcast
channel.description: Weekly updates on AI engineering practices, playbook changes, and community insights.
channel.itunes:author: AI Platform Team
channel.itunes:summary: Stay updated with the latest in AI development practices through weekly podcast episodes.

item.title: Episode 1: Welcome to the Playbook
item.description: Welcome to the first episode of the AI Development Playbook Podcast. We discuss the core tenets and recent updates.
